since_last: 57% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +4.96%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.19% · BTC +0.38% · Gold +1.78% · Nasdaq100 -0.48%. 57% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +4.96%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +4.96%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.53%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.03%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.03%, APP +7.65%, PUBM +7.43%, DV +7.29%, MGNI +7.19%. Laggards: TER -7.04%, HPE -6.51%, NXPI -6.50%, VRT -6.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.80% at $157.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
